---

# PlannedWorkout Model — Comprehensive Research Report

## 1. GraphQL Schema Definitions

### Primary Source (Amplify/AppSync Schema — the DynamoDB model definition)
**File:** `amplify/backend/api/RedefineFitnessApi/schema/planned-workout.graphql` (lines 1–74)

This is the **source of truth** for the DynamoDB table structure. It uses Amplify `@model` directives which auto-generate the DynamoDB table, GSIs, and CRUD resolvers.

```graphql
type PlannedWorkout implements Activity @shareable @apolloKey(fields: "id")
    @model(queries: null, subscriptions: null)
    @auth(rules: [
        { allow: groups, groups: ["Admins"], operations: [create, read, update, delete] }
        { allow: private, operations: [read] }
    ]) {
    id: ID!
    versionGroupID: String! @index(name: "byVersionGroupID")
    version: Int! @default(value: "1")
    isLatest: BooleanValue! @default(value: "TRUE") @index(name: "byIsLatest")
    isPublicAndLatest: String! @index(name: "byIsPublicAndLatestAndCreatedAt", sortKeyFields: ["createdAt"])
    name: String!
    time: TimeMinutes!
    type: WorkoutType! @index(name: "byWorkoutType")
    isBodyweight: Boolean!
    estimatedDurationMillis: Int
    difficulty: Difficulty!
    instructor: Instructor @belongsTo
    bodyRegions: [BodyRegion]
    goals: [WorkoutGoal]
    description: String
    muscleGroups: [MuscleGroup!]!
    granularMuscleGroups: [GranularMuscleGroup!]
    isOnMachineWorkout: Boolean
    coverImage: UserAsset
    thumbnail: UserAsset
    isChallenge: BooleanValue @index(name: "byIsChallenge", sortKeyFields: ["challengeType"])
    isComplete: Boolean! @access(cognito: true) @resolver(...)
    isGenerated: Boolean @deprecated
    isAutoGenerated: BooleanValue @index(name: "byIsAutoGeneratedAndWorkoutType", sortKeyFields: ["type"]) @default(value: "FALSE")
    isDemoWorkout: Boolean @resolver(...)
    workoutSource: WorkoutSource!
    originallyGenerated: Boolean @deprecated
    challengeType: ChallengeType!
    isAmpMode: BooleanValue @index(name: "byIsAmpMode", sortKeyFields: ["isLatest"])
    portraitThumbnail: UserAsset
    plannedBlocks: [PlannedBlock] @hasMany(...)
    categories: [WorkoutCategoryToPlannedWorkout] @hasMany(...)
    programConnections: [ProgramWorkoutConnection] @hasMany(...)
    isPublic: BooleanValue! @index(name: "byIsPublicAndCreatedAt", sortKeyFields: ["createdAt"])
    createdBy: String! @index(name: "byCreatedBy", ...) @index(name: "byCreatedByAndCreatedAt", ...) @index(name: "byCreatedByAndIsPublic", ...)
    isDraft: BooleanValue!
    isFavorite: Boolean @lambda(name: "getIsFavorite")
    isLiveChallenge: BooleanValue! @index(name: "byIsLiveChallenge")
    workoutGenerationVersion: String @index(name: "byWorkoutGenerationVersion")
    aiGenerationType: AIGenerationType
    specialWorkoutType: SpecialWorkoutType @resolver(...)
    creatorData: CreatorData @resolver(...)
    createdAt: AWSDateTime!
    isArchived: BooleanValue
    supportedOperations: [WorkoutOperation] @resolver(...)
}
```

### Apollo Server Schema (Federation layer)
**File:** `packages/amp-api/apolloServer/schema/planned-workout.graphql` (lines 1–55)

This is the **Apollo Server federated schema** — it mirrors the Amplify schema but adds `@override(from: "appsync")` for fields the Apollo Server resolves, and includes `updatedAt`. It does NOT have `@model` directives (not a DynamoDB definition).

### Additional Types in the Same Files
- **`PlannedWorkoutSearchRecord`** — Algolia search result type (lines 76–116 in Amplify, 298–327 in Apollo)
- **`PlannedWorkoutSnapshot`** — Lightweight snapshot for performed workouts (lines 58–72 in Apollo)
- **`PlannedWorkoutFormInput`** — Input type for create/update mutations (lines 272–296 in Apollo)

---

## 2. Boolean Field Patterns

### Two Distinct Boolean Patterns

#### Pattern A: `BooleanValue` enum (stored as String in DynamoDB)
```graphql
enum BooleanValue {
    TRUE
    FALSE
}
```
**Defined in:** `amplify/backend/api/RedefineFitnessApi/schema/root.graphql` (line 56), `packages/amp-api/apolloServer/schema/general.graphql` (line 43), `packages/amp-db/src/shared-types.graphql` (line 2)

**Used for fields that need to be GSI keys** (DynamoDB requires String type for index keys):

| Field | Required? | Default | Has GSI? |
|-------|-----------|---------|----------|
| `isLatest` | `BooleanValue!` | `TRUE` | Yes (`byIsLatest`) |
| `isPublic` | `BooleanValue!` | — | Yes (`byIsPublicAndCreatedAt`) |
| `isDraft` | `BooleanValue!` | — | No |
| `isLiveChallenge` | `BooleanValue!` | — | Yes (`byIsLiveChallenge`) |
| `isAutoGenerated` | `BooleanValue` (nullable) | `FALSE` | Yes (`byIsAutoGeneratedAndWorkoutType`) |
| `isChallenge` | `BooleanValue` (nullable) | — | Yes (`byIsChallenge`) |
| `isAmpMode` | `BooleanValue` (nullable) | — | Yes (`byIsAmpMode`) |
| `isArchived` | `BooleanValue` (nullable) | — | No |

#### Pattern B: Native `Boolean` (stored as BOOL in DynamoDB)
**Used for simple true/false fields that don't need indexing:**

| Field | Required? | Notes |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| `isBodyweight` | `Boolean!` | Computed from movements |
| `isOnMachineWorkout` | `Boolean` (nullable) | Optional |
| `isComplete` | `Boolean!` | Resolved at query time (not stored) |
| `isFavorite` | `Boolean` (nullable) | Resolved at query time (Lambda) |
| `isDemoWorkout` | `Boolean` (nullable) | Resolved at query time |
| `isGenerated` | `Boolean` (nullable) | Deprecated |
| `originallyGenerated` | `Boolean` (nullable) | Deprecated |

### Conversion Utilities
**File:** `packages/amp-shared/src/types/boolean-value.ts`
```typescript
booleanValueToBoolean(value: BooleanValue | null | undefined): boolean
booleanToBooleanValue(value: boolean | null | undefined): BooleanValue
```

### Key Insight: When to Use Which Pattern
- **`BooleanValue` (String enum)** → When the field is used as a DynamoDB GSI hash/sort key, OR when it needs to be queryable/filterable via DynamoDB index
- **`Boolean`** → When the field is a simple flag, computed at query time, or doesn't need indexing

---

## 3. Generated TypeScript Types

### File: `packages/amp-shared/src/API.ts` (line 7831)

```typescript
export type PlannedWorkout = Activity & {
  __typename?: 'PlannedWorkout';
  aiGenerationType?: Maybe<AiGenerationType>;
  bodyRegions?: Maybe<Array<Maybe<BodyRegion>>>;
  calculatedPlannedBlocks?: Maybe<ModelPlannedBlockConnection>;
  challengeType: ChallengeType;
  coverImage?: Maybe<UserAsset>;
  createdAt: Scalars['AWSDateTime']['output'];
  createdBy: Scalars['String']['output'];
  creatorData?: Maybe<CreatorData>;
  description?: Maybe<Scalars['String']['output']>;
  difficulty: Difficulty;
  estimatedDurationMillis?: Maybe<Scalars['Int']['output']>;
  goals?: Maybe<Array<Maybe<WorkoutGoal>>>;
  granularMuscleGroups?: Maybe<Array<GranularMuscleGroup>>;
  id: Scalars['ID']['output'];
  instructor?: Maybe<Instructor>;
  instructorPlannedWorkoutsId?: Maybe<Scalars['ID']['output']>;
  isAmpMode?: Maybe<BooleanValue>;
  isArchived?: Maybe<BooleanValue>;
  isAutoGenerated?: Maybe<BooleanValue>;
  isBodyweight: Scalars['Boolean']['output'];
  isChallenge?: Maybe<BooleanValue>;
  isComplete: Scalars['Boolean']['output'];
  isDemoWorkout?: Maybe<Scalars['Boolean']['output']>;
  isDraft: BooleanValue;
  isFavorite?: Maybe<Scalars['Boolean']['output']>;
  isGenerated?: Maybe<Scalars['Boolean']['output']>;
  isLatest: BooleanValue;
  isLiveChallenge: BooleanValue;
  isOnMachineWorkout?: Maybe<Scalars['Boolean']['output']>;
  isPublic: BooleanValue;
  isPublicAndLatest: Scalars['String']['output'];
  muscleGroups: Array<MuscleGroup>;
  name: Scalars['String']['output'];
  originallyGenerated?: Maybe<Scalars['Boolean']['output']>;
  plannedBlocks?: Maybe<ModelPlannedBlockConnection>;
  portraitThumbnail?: Maybe<UserAsset>;
  specialWorkoutType?: Maybe<SpecialWorkoutType>;
  supportedOperations?: Maybe<Array<Maybe<WorkoutOperation>>>;
  thumbnail?: Maybe<UserAsset>;
  time: TimeMinutes;
  type: WorkoutType;
  updatedAt: Scalars['AWSDateTime']['output'];
  version: Scalars['Int']['output'];
  versionGroupID: Scalars['String']['output'];
  workoutGenerationVersion?: Maybe<Scalars['String']['output']>;
  workoutSource: WorkoutSource;
};
```

### Input Type: `PlannedWorkoutFormInput` (line 7920)
Used by `createPlannedWorkoutFull` and `updatePlannedWorkoutFull` mutations. Notable: it does NOT include `isArchived`, `isLatest`, `isPublic`, `isLiveChallenge` — those are set server-side.

---

## 4. DynamoDB Table Definition (Terraform)

### File: `infra/env-once/module/appsync_generated/plannedworkout/main.tf`

**Table name pattern:** `PlannedWorkout-{appSyncAppId}-{environment}`
**Hash key:** `id` (String)
**Billing:** PAY_PER_REQUEST
**Streams:** Enabled (NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES)
**Point-in-time recovery:** Enabled for production/content/staging

### GSIs (14 total):

| GSI Name | Hash Key | Sort Key |
|----------|----------|----------|
| `byVersionGroupID` | `versionGroupID` | — |
| `byIsLatest` | `isLatest` | — |
| `byIsPublicAndLatestAndCreatedAt` | `isPublicAndLatest` | `createdAt` |
| `byWorkoutType` | `type` | — |
| `byIsChallenge` | `isChallenge` | `challengeType` |
| `byIsAutoGeneratedAndWorkoutType` | `isAutoGenerated` | `type` |
| `byWorkoutSource` | `workoutSource` | `name` |
| `byIsAmpMode` | `isAmpMode` | `isLatest` |
| `byIsPublicAndCreatedAt` | `isPublic` | `createdAt` |
| `byCreatedBy` | `createdBy` | `createdAt` |
| `byCreatedByAndCreatedAt` | `createdBy` | `createdAt` |
| `byCreatedByAndIsPublic` | `createdBy` | `isPublic` |
| `byIsLiveChallenge` | `isLiveChallenge` | — |
| `byWorkoutGenerationVersion` | `workoutGenerationVersion` | — |
| `gsi-Instructor.plannedWorkouts` | `instructorPlannedWorkoutsId` | — |

**Important:** All `BooleanValue` fields are stored as **String type "S"** in DynamoDB (values `"TRUE"` or `"FALSE"`), not as native DynamoDB Boolean.

### Table Name Enum
**File:** `packages/amp-backend-shared/src/utils/env/table-names.ts` (line 62)
```typescript
PlannedWorkout = 'PlannedWorkout',
```

---

## 5. Resolvers

### Queries
| Resolver | File |
|----------|------|
| `getPlannedWorkout(id: ID!)` | `packages/amp-api/apolloServer/src/resolvers/Query.getPlannedWorkout.resolver.ts` |
| `queryPlannedWorkouts(filters, page, pageSize)` | `packages/amp-api/apolloServer/src/resolvers/Query.queryPlannedWorkouts.resolver.ts` |

### Field Resolvers on PlannedWorkout

## 6. Data Access Layer

### Key Files
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `packages/amp-backend-shared/src/models/planned-workout/get-planned-workout.ts` | Read operations (getById, queryByType, etc.) |
| `packages/amp-backend-shared/src/models/planned-workout/patch-planned-workout.ts` | Partial updates via `patchItem` |

| `packages/amp-backend-shared/src/models/planned-workout/save-planned-workout/get-planned-workout-full-meta-data.ts` | Constructs the full PlannedWorkout object with computed fields |
| `packages/amp-backend-shared/src/models/planned-workout/save-planned-workout/types.ts` | `PlannedWorkoutToSave`, `PlannedBlockToSave`, etc. |

### How Boolean Fields Are Set During Creation
In `get-planned-workout-full-meta-data.ts`:
```typescript
isDraft: BooleanValue.FALSE,
isPublic: createdBy === AMP_PUBLIC_CREATED_BY ? BooleanValue.TRUE : BooleanValue.FALSE,
isLatest: fullExistingWorkout && formWorkoutData.id ? BooleanValue.FALSE : BooleanValue.TRUE,
isAutoGenerated: isGenerated ? BooleanValue.TRUE : BooleanValue.FALSE,
```

### How `isArchived` Is Toggled
In `Mutation.toggleArchived.resolver.ts`:
```typescript
await patchPlannedWorkoutField(getEnvTableName(TableName.PlannedWorkout), id, {
    isArchived: booleanToBooleanValue(isArchived),
});
```

---

## 7. Summary: Adding a New Boolean Field

Based on the patterns observed, to add a new boolean field to PlannedWorkout:

### If the field needs to be a DynamoDB GSI key or queryable:
1. Use `BooleanValue` type (not `Boolean`)
2. Add `@index(name: "byFieldName")` if needed
3. Add `@default(value: "FALSE")` if it has a default
4. In DynamoDB Terraform, the attribute type is `"S"` (String)
5. Use `booleanToBooleanValue()` / `booleanValueToBoolean()` for conversions

### If the field is a simple flag (no indexing needed):
1. Use `Boolean` type (nullable `Boolean` or required `Boolean!`)
2. No `@index` directive needed
3. Stored as native DynamoDB Boolean

2. **Apollo Server schema:** `packages/amp-api/apolloServer/schema/planned-workout.graphql`

Here is the comprehensive research report on how planned workouts are displayed in the amp-ios codebase:

---

## PlannedWorkout Display — Complete Research Report

### 1. GraphQL Schema & Fragments

**`PlannedWorkout` type** (Schema.graphql:6484-6536) implements the `Activity` interface. Display-relevant fields: `id`, `name`, `time` (TimeMinutes), `type` (WorkoutType), `difficulty`, `bodyRegions`, `muscleGroups`, `coverImage`/`thumbnail`/`portraitThumbnail` (UserAsset), `isComplete`, `isFavorite`, `workoutSource` (WorkoutSource), `challengeType` (ChallengeType), `specialWorkoutType`, `isCommunityWorkout`, `instructor`, `creatorData`, `goals`.

**Fragment hierarchy:**
- `PlannedWorkoutMinimal` → base display fields
- `PlannedWorkoutBase` → extends Minimal + instructor full, portraitThumbnail, creatorData, supportedOperations, isLiveChallenge, isCommunityWorkout
- `PlannedWorkoutFull` → extends Base + calculatedPlannedBlocks
- `PlannedWorkoutFullWithArguments` → extends Base + calculatedPlannedBlocks(workoutParticipantIds)

---

### 2. Swift Model — `PlannedWorkout`

**Location:** `Modules/AmpModels/Sources/Workout/PlannedWorkout/PlannedWorkout.swift`

Mirrors GraphQL fragments. Key computed properties:
- `isDemoWorkout` → `specialWorkoutType == .welcomeToAmp`
- `isChallenge` → `challengeType != .none`
- `instructorDisplayName` → instructor's full name
- `isNew` (app extension) → `createdAt > 2.weeks.ago`
- `isSingleMovementWorkout`, `isSingleSet`, `isOnMachineWorkout` (AmpModels extension)

---

### 3. Activity Enum — The Wrapper

**Location:** `Modules/AmpModels/Sources/Activities/Activity.swift`

```swift
public enum Activity {
    case workout(PlannedWorkout)
    case demo(PlannedWorkout)
    case challenge(PlannedWorkout)
    case aiWorkout(AIWorkoutActivity)
}
```

Provides unified `id`, `name`, `workout` accessors. Initialized from `Graph.ActivityMinimal`.

---

### 4. Badge System

**`BadgeStyle`** (AmpUI) — 18+ enum cases including `.new`, `.favorite`, `.completed`, `.generated`, `.challenge`, `.community`, `.plain(title:)`, `.plainMedium(title:)`, `.plannedWorkoutDay(title:)` (yellow bg), `.activeRecoveryDay` (blue bg), `.lightCompleted`.

**`LibraryBadgesView`** (AmpLibrary) — composite badge container. Render order:
1. Generated → 2. Challenge → 3. Community → 4. New (only if NOT generated AND NOT completed) → 5. Favorite → 6. Completed

All flags are optional `Bool?` with `*TitleVisible` toggles.

---

### 5. Home Screen — Weekly Carousel

**Data flow:**
```
API (GetWeeklyOverview) → WeeklyWorkoutPlan → [DayActivity]
  → DayActivityType (.workout, .activeRecovery, .generateWorkout, .error, .benchmark*)
    → DayActivityViewData (DayType + WeekDay + isDisplayable)
      → WorkoutCardViewData → WorkoutCardView
```

**`WorkoutCardView`:**
- **Incomplete:** readiness picker OR voice message → badges (`.plannedWorkoutDay` or `.activeRecoveryDay`) → title → description → "Check Today's Workout" button
- **Completed:** stats (volume/duration/kcal) → `.lightCompleted` badge → title → "Share Results" button

---

### 6. Library Views

**`LibraryWorkoutCardView`** — takes `PlannedWorkout` directly. 3:2 cover image with badge overlay (top: `LibraryBadgesView`, bottom: instructor + duration `.plain` badge).

**`LibraryWorkoutRowView`** — 6 styles (library/challenge/program/favorite/search + grid variants). 160×107 thumbnail with badge overlay. In program style, uses `isCompletedInProgram` for completed badge.

**`LibraryWorkoutViewData`** — flattened from `PlannedWorkout`. `isGenerated = workoutSource == .generated`.
